Donate.subtext: Honestly, this site costs nothing. But who knows how long that'll last.
Donate.cardText: Honestly, it's fine. If the server crashes, I just restart it. If data goes missing, I quietly restore it. But a coffee now and then does motivate late-night updates.
Donate.tierHint: Select a tier and Ko-fi opens in a new tab. After donating, click below to leave a message.
Donate.check3: You can leave a message after donating
Donate.footer: Just clicking this tab already makes you cool.
Donate.tierLunchDesc: Truly grateful. Update scheduled for tonight.

About.metaDesc: WorldStats is an interactive platform to explore the world with a 3D globe and discover country information.
About.heading: About WorldStats
About.subheading: Explore the world with an interactive 3D globe
About.whatIsBody: WorldStats is an interactive platform where you can explore 200+ countries on a 3D globe and compare stats at a glance. Click data and votes from users worldwide are reflected in real time, and anyone can leave comments or drop a promo pin on any country.
About.f1Desc: Explore the Earth with drag, zoom, inertia, and auto-rotation. Clicks accumulate in real time, and Random Spin lands you on a new country.
About.f2Desc: View capital, population, area, official languages, currency, and time zones for any country.
About.f3Desc: Convert between world currencies using live exchange rate data.
About.f4Desc: Compare two countries side by side — population, area, language, and more.
About.f5Desc: Filter countries by region and rank them by population or area.
About.f6Desc: Vote on a new country-related question every day at midnight and see how the world voted.
About.f7Desc: Leave a short comment on any country and read what others think.
About.f8Desc: Pin your service or news on any country for the world to see. Each pin stays live for 7 days.
About.guidelineSubtext: WorldStats aims to be a place anyone can enjoy comfortably. Please follow the rules below.
About.commentRule1: Comments containing URLs or links are automatically blocked.
About.commentRule2: You can post one comment per country per day.
About.commentRule3: Profanity, hate speech, and personal information are prohibited.
About.commentRule4: You can report inappropriate comments using the report button.
About.pinRule1: Only real, accessible websites can be registered (automatic DNS verification).
About.pinRule2: URL shorteners (e.g. bit.ly) are not allowed.
About.pinRule3: Pins are automatically removed 7 days after posting.
About.pinRule4: Misinformation, malicious sites, and illegal content promotion are prohibited.
About.pinRule5: You can register up to 3 pins per day.
About.sanctionNotice: Content that accumulates reports or is deemed inappropriate by the operator may be removed without prior notice. For inquiries, please use the
About.data2Desc: GDP, debt ratio, interest rates and other economic indicators
About.techList: Next.js (App Router) · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Supabase · D3.js · Vercel
About.authorBody: WorldStats started as a personal project driven by curiosity about country data. More features are added regularly.
